text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
15 
MDCD_DISEASE_MGMT_COV_MOS 
LABEL: 
Medicaid — Managed Care Disease Management Plan Coverage Months 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medicaid 
Disease Management Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan (PAHP). 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
 T-MSIS DE file 
VALUES: 
0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment) 
COMMENT: 
CCW obtains this directly from the
